duplicates.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Plumbing Repair Signals Consumer Stress And Industrial Sector Rebound

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily spike in google trends for emergency plumbing repair signals consumer stress rebound benefiting discretionary sector

idea.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Plumbing Repair Signals Consumer Stress And Industrial Sector Rebound
idea.thesis: High-frequency spikes in emergency plumbing repair searches indicate urgent home maintenance and lift industrial sector activity. Industrial sector benefits from increased demand for repair and construction related services.
idea.signal_logic: If daily searches for 'emergency plumbing repair' increase 30% day-over-day
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If daily searches for 'emergency plumbing repair' increase 30% day-over-day Exit: After 5 days or when searches fall 15% day-over-day
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily searches via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Plumbing emergencies happen frequently and create short-term consumer stress signals.

schema.idea: Daily spike in Google Trends for 'emergency plumbing repair' signals consumer stress and industrial sector rebound
schema.behavior: High-frequency spikes in emergency plumbing repair searches indicate urgent home maintenance and lift industrial sector activity.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector benefits from increased demand for repair and construction related services.

trade_logic.entry: If daily searches for 'emergency plumbing repair' increase 30% day-over-day
trade_logic.exit: After 5 days or when searches fall 15% day-over-day

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Plumbing emergencies happen frequently and create short-term consumer stress signals.

duplicates.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Emergency Septic Tank Repair Signals Local Economy Weirdness And Consumer Stress

duplicate_of.matched_title: weekly surge in google trends for home pest control emergency signals local economy weirdness and consumer stress

idea.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Emergency Septic Tank Repair Signals Local Economy Weirdness And Consumer Stress
idea.thesis: Increased septic tank repair searches indicate local infrastructure issues and consumer emergency spending. Consumer stress from home infrastructure failures tends to reduce discretionary spending.
idea.signal_logic: If weekly searches for 'emergency septic tank repair' rise 20% week-over-week
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If weekly searches for 'emergency septic tank repair' rise 20% week-over-week Exit: After 4 weeks or when searches drop 15% week-over-week
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly searches via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal and infrastructure failures cause periodic search volume spikes.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'emergency septic tank repair' signals local economy weirdness and consumer stress
schema.behavior: Increased septic tank repair searches indicate local infrastructure issues and consumer emergency spending.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer stress from home infrastructure failures tends to reduce discretionary spending.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly searches for 'emergency septic tank repair' rise 20% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or when searches drop 15% week-over-week

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal and infrastructure failures cause periodic search volume spikes.
